title: on_undeliverable + dead-letter tape
manager: A policy for messages that can't be delivered — `on_undeliverable: error | drop | dead_letter` — with a dead-letter tape (a third diagnostic tape) capturing the ones you chose to keep. Undeliverable messages are inevitable in a dynamic system (the target retired, the queue was full); making the policy explicit and the dead letters inspectable is the difference between a debuggable system and one that silently drops messages on the floor.
cs: `on_undeliverable: error|drop|dead_letter` (§22); dead-letter tape (third diagnostic tape); explicit per-system policy; feeds diagnostics.
